Group — Continuous Unmet Target (2+ Weeks)

Groups with 2+ consecutive weeks below weekly target, sorted by consecutive weeks (descending).

Agent Overview

Per module, agents are sorted by daily actual repay amount (high to low).

Recovery Trend by Module

Current month daily recovery trend per module. Blue solid line = actual recovery, Green dashed line = daily target.

At-Risk Modules — Group Drill-down

Modules where projected month-end recovery is below target. Based on 7-day average trend.
